basic_details.job_title: IIM Guwahati Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Guwahati (IIM Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Guwahati (IIM Guwahati) has released the official Junior Engineer (Civil) Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment has been announced for the post of Junior Engineer (Civil), with the number of vacancies not specified in the notification. Eligible candidates aged up to 35 years and holding a Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering can apply online for the IIM Guwahati Junior Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026. The online application process is currently active and will remain open until 06 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online applic

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per GOI rules

qualification.details: Junior Engineer (Civil): Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized university/institute. Minimum 5 years of relevant experience in civil, maintenance of infrastructure and campus. Similar work experience in reputed educational institutions such as IIMs, IITs etc. would be preferable.

salary_details.details: Pay and benefits in Paylevel 06 under 7th CPC.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Guwahati Junior Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Engineer (Civil) post at IIM Guwahati?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Junior Engineer (Civil) position at IIM Guwahati is 06 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the required qualification for the Junior Engineer (Civil) role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized university or institute to be eligible for the Junior Engineer (Civil) post.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are required for the Junior Engineer (Civil) position?
faq.answer: A minimum of 5 years of relevant experience in civil engineering, maintenance of infrastructure, and campus facilities is required for this role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Engineer (Civil) recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Engineer (Civil) post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Junior Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: The Junior Engineer (Civil) position offers pay and benefits in Paylevel 06 under the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC).

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the IIM Guwahati Junior Engineer (Civil) vacancy?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply only through the online mode for the Junior Engineer (Civil) recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Junior Engineer (Civil) position?
faq.answer: The Junior Engineer (Civil) position is offered on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIM Guwahati located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates with experience in educational institutions get preference?
faq.answer: Yes, similar work experience in reputed educational institutions such as IIMs and IITs would be preferable for the Junior Engineer (Civil) role.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Junior Engineer (Civil) post at IIM Guwahati?
